race.description: Become A Southside Racing Member Hcp (Bm62)
race.comment: DECANTED (9) is going well without winning, again in the minor money last time at Bendigo. He'll land in a lovely spot and take catching in what looks to set up quite well for him over his pet trip. RUSSIAN DUCHESS (11) was just okay first up at Ballarat Synthetic but is expected to improve quickly onto turf with the added fitness, her form last time in was promising and she gets the handy claim for Jabez Johnstone. JEWEL BAY (2) is coming off a solid win over this track and trip and finds another similar race from a good draw, right in the mix again. BLUE BANDIT (4) tried hard last time at Sale on heavy ground when well supported and turns around quickly here with claims to go one better.
